docs.title: Welcome to the Citiwatts wiki 👋
docs.text:
Read Wiki Edit Wiki

  • Read Wiki: https://citiwatts.github.io/wiki/
  • Edit Wiki: https://github.com/citiwatts/wiki/wiki

docs.title: About the Citiwatts Toolbox
docs.text: Citiwatts offers an open-source online software that supports the planning processes of the energy sector at local and national levels in a transparent manner. It is a website that allows you to provide a first estimation of the heating and cooling demand in any European region as well as the local renewable energy potential to meet this demand. Subsequently, by using more detailed data and applying Citiwatts calculation modules, much more comprehensive heating and cooling strategies can be elaborated. Thanks to this software, you will be able to make practical decisions in your area of interest (village, town, city, region, etc.).

Guideline: Citiwatts Toolbox On Local Level
First Steps
docs.text:
To be able to edit this wiki, make sure that:

  • ✅ You have a GitHub account.
  • ✅ You are logged in to GitHub.
  • ✅ You have been added as a contributor to this wiki.

docs.title: Edit Page
docs.text:
Go To Top

  • Click Edit Page at top right.
  • Edit content in GitHub wiki frontend.
  • Use Preview to see your changes.
  • Click Save Page at bottom right.
  • Changes take time to be visible in read frontend.

docs.title: Edit Page Title
docs.text:
Go To Top

  • Click Edit Page at top right.
  • Edit part after title: in GitHub wiki frontend.
  • Use Preview to see your changes.
  • Click Save Page at bottom right.
  • Changes take time to be visible in read frontend.

docs.title: Markdown How To
docs.text:
Go To Top

  • Markdown Cheat Sheet ~ markdownguide.org
  • Markdown Basic Syntax ~ markdownguide.org

docs.title: Create New Page
docs.text:
Go To Top

  • Click Edit Page at top right.
  • Click New Page in GitHub wiki frontend.
  • Use Preview to see your changes.
  • Click Save Page at bottom right.
  • Changes take time to be visible in read frontend.

docs.title: Delete Page
docs.text:
Go To Top

  • Click Edit Page at top right.
  • Click Delete page in GitHub wiki frontend.
  • Confirm Are you sure? dialogue.
  • Changes take time to be visible in read frontend.

docs.title: See Page History
docs.text:
Go To Top

  • Click Edit Page at top right.
  • Click Page history in GitHub wiki frontend.
